# Island Mountain

## About
Pre-built, burn-tested on-premise AI inference servers with NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell GPUs. Air-gapped, HIPAA-ready, ITAR-compliant. One-time purchase. No cloud fees. No subscriptions. No per-token charges. Built in Colorado.

## Products
Three tiers of local AI inference hardware:
- Summit Base: 2x NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell 96GB, 192GB GDDR7 ECC VRAM, AMD EPYC 7413, 512GB DDR4 ECC. $59K-$69K.
- Summit Ridge: Build-to-order configuration. $95K-$120K.
- Summit Pinnacle: 4x NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell 96GB, 384GB GDDR7 ECC VRAM. $175K-$225K. Pre-order now.


Landfall Series (Home AI):
- Landfall Scout: NVIDIA RTX 5080 16GB. Home AI server for personal use. $7,000-$8,000.
- Landfall Ranger: NVIDIA RTX 5090 32GB. Family and small business AI server. $9,500-$11,500.
- Landfall Pack Leader: NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell 32GB. Professional home AI server with maximum capability. $15,000-$22,000.

All Landfall systems are air-gapped by design. One-time purchase. No subscriptions.
All systems ship with DeepSeek V4-Flash pre-installed, OpenWebUI configured, and 72 hours of burn-in testing completed.

## Who This Is For
- Law firms protecting attorney-client privilege (ABA Model Rule 1.6)
- Medical practices needing HIPAA compliance without a BAA
- Defense contractors handling ITAR/CUI/CMMC-regulated data
- Tribal nations exercising data sovereignty (OCAP principles)
- Research labs protecting unpublished data and grant-funded IP
- Financial institutions complying with GLBA and PCI DSS
- Insurance carriers protecting policyholder PII and health data
- Energy and utility companies meeting NERC CIP and IEC 62443 requirements
- Government agencies handling CUI under FedRAMP and NIST SP 800-171
- Educational institutions protecting student records under FERPA
- Casino gaming operations complying with Title 31 BSA/AML, NIGC MICS, and state gaming commission cybersecurity requirements

## Team
- Basho Parks, Co-founder. AI systems, prompt engineering, forward deployment, business development, and content. Background in tribal emergency management with the Yurok Tribe. [CV](https://islandmountain.io/basho-parks.html)
- John Dougherty, Co-founder. Hardware engineering and product. 25 years in enterprise security and GPU systems. [johndou.com](https://www.johndou.com)
